place_name: Bad Ass Coffee of Hawaii | Rock Hill

details.place_name: Bad Ass Coffee of Hawaii (Rock Hill, SC)
details.address: 220 W White St, Rock Hill, SC 29730

raw_data.address: 220 W White St, Rock Hill, SC 29730
raw_data.name: Bad Ass Coffee of Hawaii (Rock Hill, SC)
raw_data.name_for_emails: Bad Ass Coffee Of Hawaii Rock Hill Sc
raw_data.subtypes: Coffee shop, Cafe, Coffee store, Hawaiian goods store, Hawaiian restaurant

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha! Thank you for taking a moment to share your experience. We are so pleased to hear you like our coffee and laid back vibes as much as we do. We look forward to serving you again soon. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: Good strong coffee. Ice cubes ARE coffee so no water down if ordering an iced coffee. Staff was very nice. Great atmosphere and very open. Food was yummy.

reviews_data.owner_answer: April, mahalo for taking the time to share your experience with us. We apologize that your experience was not what you expected. We'd like to learn more about your experience, so we can work to improve. Please contact us at bachrockhill@e3-enterprise.com  so we can make this right.
reviews_data.review_text: I’ll pass on going here again. Ordered a large and got a medium. When they remade it the large tasted bad. $15 for bad coffee and the smallest sandwich. The space is nice but thats the only positive I could find.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha Dana, thank you very much for taking the time to provide your perspective! Our name found its origin from the generations of donkeys in Kona, Hawaii that could be heard bellowing as they carried   precious loads of coffee beans down the steep mountains of the Big Island. The people of Kona named these hard-working donkeys the "Bad A$$ Ones" because of their reliably strong, but stubborn nature in carrying their precious cargo. Our name pays tribute to the legend of those hard-working donkeys and now we are stubborn about our sourcing, roasting, and serving quality Hawaiian coffee and doing so with the Aloha Spirit.
reviews_data.review_text: Horrible name for a business.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Linda, aloha! We're thrilled to hear you enjoy our Hawaiian coffee as much as we do and we are so glad you had a good experience with our staff. We hope to see you again soon! Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: I was so excited to see one open up near us! I always visit when we go to the beach and love the entire menu....especially the fact that they use coffee for the ice cubes! Genius! The staff at this location was super friendly....its in a very easy area to navigate and park...and lots of seating!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha, Angelina! Thank you for taking a moment to share your experience. We are so pleased to hear you like our menu offerings and had a great experience with our staff! We look forward to serving you again soon. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: Very nice space with an extensive coffee and tea menu. A variety of swag for sale, friendly service and tasty coffee.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Pierson, aloha! Thank you for supporting local and for taking the time to write a recommendation about our iced Americano and our coffee cubes! We appreciate your continued support and hope to see you again soon. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: This is a nice place.  The iced Americano was perfect because they have really top tier ice, sort of like expensive cocktail ice cubes. ❤️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha Patty! Thank you for sharing your positive experience! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed the coffee and that our service was great. We look forward to welcoming you back soon, and hope you get a chance to try our pastries or breakfast sandwiches next time. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: 1st time here and the coffee and service was great. Didn't try any pastries, but they look good. Will definitely be back. A great place to get some work done.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha Keisa! Thank you for sharing your positive experience. We're delighted to hear that our place brings back fond memories of Kona, Hawaii, and that you found our team friendly and helpful. We look forward to welcoming you back soon! Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: I used to live in Kona Hawaii and this makes me feel at home. The owers are friendly and the staff very helpful. I have found another spot in the area to visit.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha Sam! Thank you for your feedback and for the five-star rating! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed our coffee and appreciated the use of coffee ice cubes. We understand your concerns about the noise level and appreciate your suggestion regarding sound dampening. Your input is valuable to us as we strive to improve the experience for all our customers. We do plan on holding some events with a quieter atmosphere in the future that we would love for you to check out. We hope to welcome you back for another great cup of coffee! Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text:
The coffee is definitely some of the best I've had in rock hill. They use coffee ice cubes so your drink doesnt get watered down.

My only issue is it's VERY loud in here. I like to sit and read for a while while I sip on my coffee but this is not a relaxing atmosphere. It's loud even with my noise cancelling headphones on. Some sort of sound dampening in here would go a long way. As it is now it's too loud and I probably won't be coming back here to read.

Still five stars because the staff and coffee are both awesome, this is just a personal preference.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha! Thank you for your review! We're thrilled to be here and look forward to serving you. Your support means a lot to us. Mahalo!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: So excited to have one here.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha! Thank you for sharing your experience! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the iced Americano and appreciated the atmosphere and service. It's wonderful to know that our coffee options have made a great impression on you. We look forward to welcoming you back on your commute. Your support means a lot to us! Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text:
Have been a few times in a week not everyday so not too shameful. Lol. Had the best iced Americano today. 😋. Coffee has low acid and tastes good without sweetener,plus no reflux.
The ladies are  pleasant and the place is a cute and clean vibe. Will definitely keep in my rotation as I have gone out of way on commute. This is how good their  coffee options are. Great start for the new business!
.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha, Rick! We are grateful that you found us and took the time to share kind words about your experience. We hope to see you again soon so you can continue to try our selection of signature lattes, breakfast goods, and more. Mahalo!

review_questions.Group size: 3-4 people, Suitable for all group sizes
review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: If you want real Hawaii coffee, this is the place to be, breakfast sandwiches delicious. Coffee outstanding, will return 👍

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha Julie! Thank you for sharing your experience! We're delighted to hear you enjoyed the Monkey Mocha and appreciated our coffee ice cubes. It's great to know our staff and service met your expectations. We look forward to welcoming you back to try more from our menu. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text:
Great vibes here. Large iced Monkey Mocha coffee, big muffin (warmed) plus tip was $13. Their ice cubes are made of coffee so your drink doesn't get watered down. I'll try a sandwich next time. The staff was super friendly and the service was prompt. There's lots of parking. We sat outside since it was such a sunny day.
Great place to grab a quick coffee or maybe hang out for awhile if you've got time.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha, Ariel! Thank you for your kind words and positive feedback! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed your experience and look forward to welcoming you back to try more of our offerings. Your support means a lot to us. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: The staff were so nice and my drink was well made. I will return to try more of the drinks! It’s a great addition to Rock Hill.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Nicole, aloha! We're thrilled to hear you enjoy our Hawaiian coffee as much as we do. We are so happy to be a part of the Rock Hill community! We hope to see you again soon! Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: My coffee was absolutely delicious! I love that the ice cubes used are actually frozen coffee. This means that the coffee is never diluted as the ice cubes melt. I really like the decor and atmosphere as well. I’m so glad that they are in Rock Hill. I have had BadAss Coffee when on vacation, but now I can get it any time.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha, Danny! Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're glad to hear you enjoyed the matcha. We apologize for your experience with the spam breakfast sandwich and appreciate your comments. Your insights are valuable and will be shared with our team to help us improve. We hope you'll consider visiting us again to try other items on our menu. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text:
Let me start with I am not a coffee fan in the slightest but I saw they had Matcha and, being a recent convert to matcha, I figured i would try them out since they are near the office. I also decided to try the spam breakfast sandwich.

The matcha is the only reason they getting a three stars. It was good and flavorful and I would probably get again.

As for the sandwich, this is a one star for being microwaved. If not microwaved then the bun was overcooked. The top bun had that hard chewy/inedible texture you get when you microwave a jimmy deans breakfast sandwich at home too long. Hence my assumption on it being microwaved. This is a huge let down. The pineapple was bits and pieces and not a slice/ring.  Once i discarded the top bun the rest of the sandwich was edible but nothing to really write home about. The flavor of the sandwich was not bad but it felt cheap for the price. Barely a step up from gas station sandwich. I would rather go next door to Sully Steamers and get a bagel sandwich.

I

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha, Coach Josh! Thank you for your positive feedback! We're so glad to hear that you found our staff friendly. We look forward to serving you again soon. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: The staff are very friendly.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha, Riley! Thank you for sharing your wonderful experience! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed the coffee and loved the coffee ice cubes. It's great to know our team's enthusiasm and friendliness made your visit even better. We look forward to welcoming you back as you explore our menu! Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text:
Best tasting coffee I have had in a long time!! The coffee I’ve cubes are genius, my coffee stayed strong all day. Employees are so friendly and seem so excited to be there, which made me really excited!

We are going every day this week to try every menu item🩷

reviews_data.owner_answer: Dustin, aloha! Thank you for the great feedback! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed our coffee and coffee ice cubes. We look forward to serving you again soon! Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: Great coffee. I love their coffee ice they use in the iced coffee.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Aloha! Thank you for taking a moment to share your experience. We are so pleased to hear you like our coffee and vibes as much as we do. We look forward to serving you again soon. Mahalo!
reviews_data.review_text: Coffee has a very strong robust flavor. Very good. Breakfast sandwich was excellent. Great vibes inside as well.

Let me start with I am not a coffee fan in the slightest but I saw they had Matcha and, being a recent convert to matcha, I figured i would try them out since they are near the office. I also decided to try the spam breakfast sandwich.

The matcha is the only reason they getting a three stars. It was good and flavorful and I would probably get again.

As for the sandwich, this is a one star for being microwaved. If not microwaved then the bun was overcooked. The top bun had that hard chewy/inedible texture you get when you microwave a jimmy deans breakfast sandwich at home too long. Hence my assumption on it being microwaved. This is a huge let down. The pineapple was bits and pieces and not a slice/ring.  Once i discarded the top bun the rest of the sandwich was edible but nothing to really write home about. The flavor of the sandwich was not bad but it felt cheap for the price. Barely a step up from gas station sandwich. I would rather go next door to Sully Steamers and get a bagel sandwich.

posts.body:
June's Island Flavor of the Month!

Sweet blueberries. Buttery macadamia nuts. One legendary flavor!

It's our obsession this month! Stop in and get yourself a bag - you can thank us later!
